frictions.description: NY Windows events are composite events (FVGs, swings, displacements within Window A/B), not raw bar counts. The parent task guidance suggested filtering bars by ny_window column, but the fixture data contains detection events from leaf detectors. Validation was performed by verifying fixture counts directly against the assertion specifications.
frictions.resolution: Validated fixture event counts and timestamps directly; also verified data layer ny_window tagging infrastructure works correctly for all TFs (1m, 5m, 15m).

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. All baseline fixture event counts match assertion specifications exactly (5m: 30A/23B, 1m: 104A/95B, 15m: 11A/13B). All event timestamps fall within correct NY window hour ranges. Data layer ny_window tagging verified working across all TFs. Existing pytest ny_window tests pass (2/2).
